name: Mango and Orange Sorbet (Nieve De Mango y Naranja)
recipeInstructions:
1. Transfer the orange juice into a freezer-safe container and freeze until completely solid. Run hot water over the container for a few seconds, then turn out the frozen block of orange juice.
2. Stone, peel, and slice the flesh of the large mango.
3. Blend the frozen juice and mango in a blender until smooth (it may make an unusual noise initially). Transfer to a freezer-safe container and freeze until ready to serve. For a softer sorbet, pulse the mixture briefly in a food processor or blender before serving chilled in glasses or scoops, sprinkled with grated chocolate.
